data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplifies decision-making processes for the users.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined interface design to reduce complexity and choice overload.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Improves accessibility and usability of interactive elements.
data.technical_spec: Optimized button sizes and placement to minimize interaction time.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Balances visual appeal with functionality to enhance perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Adopts YouTube's signature clean and minimalist design.

data.title: Serial Position Effect
data.description: Leverages cognitive bias by placing critical content at list beginnings or ends.
data.technical_spec: Recommendation and playlist algorithms prioritize key content positions.

data.title: Law of Common Region
data.description: Groups related content to improve cognitive comprehension and navigation.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes borders and colors to create coherent areas for related content.
